input:
Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to inform you about an important update to your account security settings. To ensure the continued protection of your financial information, we have made some changes to our verification process. Please review the attached document for detailed information on how these updates may affect your account.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact our support team.

Sincerely,
Your Bank Security Department

Subject: Quick question about your recent purchase!

Hi [Customer Name],

Hope you're having a great day! We just wanted to follow up on your recent order, #[Order Number]. We're so glad you chose us! 

We noticed a small typo in the shipping address you provided. It looks like there might be an extra 's' in the street name. We wanted to confirm this with you before we send it out, just to make sure everything gets to you smoothly. 

Could you please take a quick look and let us know if the address is indeed [Potentially Incorrect Address]? Or if you'd prefer, you can reply with the correct address.

Thanks so much for your help!

Best regards,
The [Company Name] Team

Subject: Your Recent Account Activity Notice

Dear Valued Customer,

This is an automated notification to inform you about recent activity on your account. We have successfully updated your billing information as per your request on [Date].

No further action is required from your end. If you did not initiate this change, please contact our support team immediately at support@examplecompany.com referencing Case ID #789012.

Thank you for choosing Example Company.

Sincerely,
The Example Company Team

Subject: Urgent Action Required: Unusual Activity Detected on Your Account

Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected unusual login activity on your [Bank Name] online banking account. For your security, we have temporarily limited access to your account. To restore full access and ensure the safety of your funds, please verify your account details immediately.

Click on the link below to securely log in and confirm your information:

http://secure-bank-login-verify.com/update-account

Failure to complete this verification within 24 hours may result in permanent account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
The [Bank Name] Security Department
